name: The Bunker CHS
address: 547 Long Point Rd #113, Mt Pleasant, SC 29464
about: The Bunker CHS is an indoor golf and sports recreational facility located in Mount Pleasant, SC. The venue features top-of-the-line Golfzon simulators, interactive axe throwing lanes, and augmented reality dartboards, all complemented by a self-serve beer tap wall and various food options. It is designed to provide an engaging, multi-sport experience for both golfers and non-golfers. Public hours are Wednesday to Monday, 10:00am–10:00pm, with extended hours available for members.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfzon simulators with advanced swing analysis
Self-serve beer tap wall and food options

food_and_drink.notes: Various options from local vendors and trucks, including soft pretzels, chips and queso, and chips and salsa.
Self-serve beer tap wall available for customers.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line simulators with auto-teeing and advanced swing analysis.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, but the venue offers a self-serve beer tap wall and various food options from local vendors.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Mid to low handicappers finish 18 holes in approximately 45 minutes; a foursome can complete 9 holes in about 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Bunker CHS is family-friendly and welcomes children for activities like golf and axe throwing.
